title: Principal Radiologist at Philips India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Philips India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!
